title: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed and who is in it
display_title: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed and who is in it
wikitext:
[]: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed (and who is in it?)             Quote Post by user12345 » Sun Feb 19, 2023 3:28 am Hi all, I'm sure this is probably a well-known fact but I figured if anyone would know it would be you guys. I've always been curious as to who these three women are. Anyone know? Where is this footage being filmed? Is it also Shinjuku, where the footage of the audience comes from?

[]: Re: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed (and who is in it?)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 19, 2023 7:41 am Don't know if this helps: https://youtu.be/uLyPNje8oiw

[]: Re: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed (and who is in it?)             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Feb 25, 2023 11:56 am The live action portions, which were originally different and significantly longer, had the voice actors playing the roles. The characters in the street are actually mannequins as the above video showed. Deleted live action sequences were shot 19th-25th January 1997, while the reshot materials were done 8th-10th May. The audience sequence was shot at an early Death and Rebirth screening 14th March at the Shinjuku Milano which no longer exists.

[]: Re: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed (and who is in it?)             Quote Post by Radioman » Mon Sep 25, 2023 8:49 am I googled both in English and Japanese, but couldn't find exact location where this scene with Misato, Asuka and Rei standing in a crowd was filmed. So, I registered on this forum only to post the result of my personal investigation. TL;DR: 35°40'05.3"N 139°36'00.5"E Chitose-karasuyama station, Setagaya City, Tokyo Investigation details: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: where was the live action footage in End of Evangelion filmed (and who is in it?)             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Tue Oct 03, 2023 7:30 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Don't know if this helps: https://youtu.be/uLyPNje8oiw
